fixtures.expected:
{
  "_comment": "ChirpStack Semtech UDP global_conf.json for Milesight UG67 Outdoor LoRaWAN Gateway. Authored by @intelligent-farming/lorawan-gateway-catalog (AGPL-3.0-or-later; see NOTICE). Point the packet forwarder at the ChirpStack Gateway Bridge UDP backend (default port 1700). Downlink additionally needs a tx_lut tuned to this concentrator — see the vendor documentation.",
  "SX130x_conf": {
    "lorawan_public": true,
    "clksrc": 0,
    "antenna_gain": 0,
    "full_duplex": false,
    "radio_0": { "enable": true, "type": "SX1250", "freq": 867500000, "tx_enable": true },
    "radio_1": { "enable": true, "type": "SX1250", "freq": 868500000, "tx_enable": false },
    "chan_multiSF_0": { "enable": true, "radio": 1, "if": -400000 },
    "chan_multiSF_1": { "enable": true, "radio": 1, "if": -200000 },
    "chan_multiSF_2": { "enable": true, "radio": 1, "if": 0 },
    "chan_multiSF_3": { "enable": true, "radio": 0, "if": -400000 },
    "chan_multiSF_4": { "enable": true, "radio": 0, "if": -200000 },
    "chan_multiSF_5": { "enable": true, "radio": 0, "if": 0 },
    "chan_multiSF_6": { "enable": true, "radio": 0, "if": 200000 },
    "chan_multiSF_7": { "enable": true, "radio": 0, "if": 400000 },
    "chan_Lora_std": { "enable": true, "radio": 1, "if": -200000, "bandwidth": 250000, "spread_factor": 7 },
    "chan_FSK": { "enable": true, "radio": 1, "if": 300000, "bandwidth": 125000, "datarate": 50000 }
  },
  "gateway_conf": {
    "gateway_ID": "24E124FFFE010203",
    "server_address": "chirpstack.example.com",
    "serv_port_up": 1700,
    "serv_port_down": 1700,
    "keepalive_interval": 10,
    "stat_interval": 30,
    "push_timeout_ms": 100,
    "forward_crc_valid": true,
    "forward_crc_error": false,
    "forward_crc_disabled": false
  }
}
